text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Volunteering & Donating > Clothing Donation Programs * Children 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter Children Disaster/Emergency Issues Infants/Toddlers Men Pregnant Individuals Women Youth Issues Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF WARRENTON FIRST BAPTIST CHURCH CHILDREN'S CLOTHING BANK Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers gently used clothing with sizes for infants through sixth grade. Accepts donations of new car seats, gently used toys, and children's clothing. 30 NE 1st Street Warrenton, OR 97146 Eligibility: Ages 0-12 Hours: Friday, 3pm-6pm and Saturday, 10am-1pm (503) 791-7522 Get Directions Visit Website More Details WARRENTON FIRST BAPTIST CHURCH CHILDREN'S CLOTHING BANK
